content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于6月29日20:25(UTC+8) 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2026年7月13日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
 
【故事】
● 调查行动
    ○ 修复了多维链接「被遗忘的爱之种」中，一处剧情的背景图显示错误的问题。
    ○ 修复了意识潜游「沉溺」第二节「哗啦～哗啦～」剧情中，一处角色头像显示错误的问题。
● 秘典书库
    ○ 修复了「场景 CG-野外」中，一处背景图显示错误的问题。
● 本地化
    ○ 通用
        ■ 修复了部分语言设置下，「唤醒体」技能提升至最大等级的故事中，故事文本较长时可能出现无法滑动的问题。
        ■ 修复了简体中文、英语以外的多个语言设置下，部分技能、命轮、事件、造物描述中的效果数值未能正确显示的问题。
    ○ 英语
        ■ 修复了部分战斗界面中，唤醒体「庞托斯」的「围猎」状态描述错误地显示为机器翻译的问题。
    ○ 韩语
        ■ 修复了唤醒体「庞托斯」的语音及技能描述文字未能显示为人工翻译的问题。
        ■ 修复了剧情文本中，部分角色名和对话框标注的角色名字翻译不统一的问题。
        ■ 修复了唤醒体「温柯尔」、「茉夏」、「朵尔」译名不统一的问题，现已统一为「윙클」、「무셰트」、「돌」。
        ■ 修复了「深海」界域机制中，「潮涌」、「静海」、「怒涛」翻译不统一的问题，现已统一为「조수」、「정해」、「노도」。
 
【战斗】
● 通用
    ○ 修复了装备「梦游仙境」的唤醒体在拥有「意识干涉」状态时，新生成的卡牌有封印特效但仍旧能够打出的问题。
    ○ 修复了拥有「销毁」状态的卡牌被「虚无」效果消耗后，没有正确地从本场战斗中移除的问题。
● 唤醒体
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「塔薇」释放生成的「驭魇哨音」后，生成的「囚魇」数值错误的问题。
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「莉莉」在某些情况下，狂气爆发描述错误地显示乱码的问题。
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「庞托斯」在「囚魇」全部升级后，生成的「高级灵感」在手牌达到上限时，没有「销毁」的问题。
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「庞托斯」指令卡在「自动战斗」中的优先级错误的问题。修复后「纵魇掠袭」的优先级降低。
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「希洛」、「血链·希洛」的增益卡牌「不规则形态」、「不规则形态·血链」被错误地放置在手牌区域最左侧的问题。
● 关卡
    ○ 修复了「星辰篇」中可能会错误地同时获得造物及其强化造物的问题。
 
【综合】
● 战斗回放
    ○ 修复了「相位对弈」的战斗回放中，某些情况下画面会异常闪烁的问题。
● 幻梦深潜
    ○ 修复了「排行榜」中从「赛季排行」切换到「排行奖励」时，会错误地提示「失败」的问题。
● 相位对弈
    ○ 修复了「相位对弈」中，部分守密人的对弈头衔信息未显示的问题。
    ○ 修复了「相位对弈」中，部分守密人对弈头衔信息与实际不一致的问题。

**V2.5.2.1 Online Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on  June 29, 2026 at 20:25(UTC+8) . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
   
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50
   
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on July 13, 2026 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
   
[Update Content]
 
[Story]
● Investigation
    ○ Fixed an issue in the Multiverse Link "Forgotten Seed of Love" where a Story's background image was displaying incorrectly.
    ○ Fixed an issue in the Psyche Deepdive "Indulgence" Chapter 2 "Splish~ Splash~" Story where a Character portrait was displaying incorrectly.
● Library
    ○ Fixed an issue in "Scene CG - Wilderness" where a background image was displaying incorrectly.
● Localization
    ○ General
        ■ Fixed an issue in certain language settings where, in the story of an "Awakener" Skill being upgraded to the maximum Level, the story text could not be scrolled when it was too long.
        ■ Fixed an issue where effect values in certain Skill, Wheel of Destiny, Event, and Relic descriptions were not displaying correctly under multiple language settings other than Simplified Chinese and English.
    ○ English
        ■ Fixed an issue where the "Pack Hunt" State description of the Awakener "Pontos" was incorrectly displayed as machine translation in certain combat UI.
    ○ Korean
        ■ Fixed an issue where the Awakener "Pontos" voice and Skill description text were not displaying the human translation.
        ■ Fixed an issue where some character names in the Story text were inconsistently translated compared to the character names labeled in the dialogue boxes.
        ■ Fixed an issue where the Awakener names "Winkle", "Mouchette", and "Doll" were inconsistently translated; they have now been unified as "윙클", "무셰트", and "돌".
        ■ Fixed an issue in the "Aequor" Realm mechanic where "Surging Tides", "Tranquil Sea", and "Raging Waves" had inconsistent translations; they have now been unified as "조수", "정해", and "노도".

[Combat]
● General
    ○ Fixed an issue where an Awakener equipped with "Dreaming of Wonderland" would generate Cards with the Sealed effect that could still be played while in the "Consciousness Interference" State.
    ○ Fixed an issue where Cards with the "Destroy" State were not correctly removed from the current battle after being consumed by the "Fleeting" Effect.
● Awakener
    ○ Fixed an issue where the number of "Gaunt" generated was incorrect after the Awakener "Tawil" Unleashed the generated "Gauntwards' Call".
    ○ Fixed an issue where the Awakener "Lily" would incorrectly display garbled text in the Exalt description under certain circumstances.
    ○ Fixed an issue where the "Adv. Insight" generated by the Awakener "Pontos" after all "Gaunt" Upgrades were completed was not being "Destroyed" when the Hand reached its limit.
    ○ Fixed an issue where the Awakener "Pontos" Command Card priority was incorrect in "Auto Battle". After the fix, the priority of "Gaunt Ravage" has been lowered.
    ○ Fixed an issue where the buff Cards "Irregular Form" and "Irregular Form·Chain" of Awakeners "Helot" and "Helot: Catena" were incorrectly placed at the leftmost position of the Hand area.
● Stage
    ○ Fixed an issue in "Astral Reign" where it was possible to incorrectly obtain both a Relic and its Enhanced Relic simultaneously.
 
[General]
● Battle Replay
    ○ Fixed an issue where the screen would abnormally Blink in certain situations during the Traphase battle replay.
● Phantasmal Dive
    ○ Fixed an issue where switching from "Season Rankings" to "Ranking Rewards" in the "Leaderboard" would incorrectly display a "Failed" message.
● Traphase
    ○ Fixed an issue in "Traphase" where the duel title information for some Keepers was not displaying.
    ○ Fixed an issue in "Traphase" where some Keeper match title information was inconsistent with the actual data.
What about her needs fixing? I haven't noticed anything off.
